site.name: ef-sinn
home.hero.title: Where Art Meets Craftsmanship
home.hero.subtitle: Custom woodwork crafted with passion and precision
home.intro.title: Your Carpenter in Munich – Craft Perfection with Passion
home.intro.p1: As a carpentry workshop in Munich and Unterhaching, we create extraordinary custom furniture, fitted kitchens, parquet flooring and wooden installations with years of experience, making your space truly unique. Wood is our muse, and our creativity knows no bounds.
home.intro.p2: From laying parquet flooring to custom built-in wardrobes and kitchens, to furniture for special requirements – tables, beds, bathroom furniture and much more. Every project is executed with the utmost care and craftsmanship. Whether standard dimensions or custom requests: we find the perfect solution.
home.services.title: Our Services
home.services.subtitle: Quality and creativity in every detail
home.services.s1.title: Custom Furniture
home.services.s1.desc: Individual furniture that perfectly fits your space. Tables, beds, shelves and more – all crafted to your wishes.
home.services.s2.title: Kitchens & Wardrobes
home.services.s2.desc: Custom fitted kitchens and wardrobe solutions that perfectly unite functionality and aesthetics.
home.services.s3.title: Staircases
home.services.s3.desc: High-quality wooden staircases, individually crafted. From straight stairs to curved designs – executed with craft perfection.
home.services.s4.title: Wooden Terraces
home.services.s4.desc: Weather-resistant wooden terraces for your outdoor area. With or without a roof – durable and naturally beautiful.
home.services.s5.title: Parquet Flooring & Interior Fitting
home.services.s5.desc: Laying, sanding and sealing parquet flooring – solid parquet, engineered parquet and wide-plank boards. Plus wooden ceilings, wall cladding and complete interior fitting with wood.
home.services.s6.title: Repair & Restoration
home.services.s6.desc: Valuable furniture pieces deserve a second life. We restore and repair with care and expertise.
home.portfolio.title: Our Work
home.portfolio.subtitle: Glimpses of our handcrafted creations
home.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
home.faq.subtitle: Answers to the most important questions about our carpentry work
home.faq.q1: What carpentry services does ef-sinn offer in Munich?
home.faq.q2: Does ef-sinn also lay parquet flooring in Munich?
home.faq.a2: Yes! We professionally lay parquet flooring in Munich and the surrounding area. We work with solid parquet, engineered parquet, wide-plank boards and strip parquet. We also offer parquet sanding, oiling and sealing – both for new installations and for refinishing existing floors.
home.faq.q3: Does ef-sinn build furniture for special requirements and custom requests?
home.faq.a3: Absolutely! Custom requests and special requirements are exactly our strength. Whether unusual dimensions, special wood types, barrier-free solutions, integrated technology or unconventional designs – every project is individually planned and crafted according to your wishes.
home.faq.q4: What does a carpenter charge for custom furniture in Munich?
home.faq.a4: The cost of custom furniture depends on material, size, complexity and surface finish. We create an individual and transparent quote for every project after a personal consultation. Contact us at info@ef-sinn.de or +49 176 8718 6451.
home.faq.q5: What is the difference between a Schreiner and a Tischler?
home.faq.a5: Schreiner and Tischler are two German terms for the same profession – carpenter or joiner. In Bavaria and southern Germany the term "Schreiner" is used, while in northern and eastern Germany "Tischler" is preferred. The training, skills and activities are identical. ef-sinn in Munich is your carpenter for custom woodwork.
home.faq.a6: ef-sinn is based in Munich and Unterhaching and serves customers throughout Munich, Unterhaching, Taufkirchen, Ottobrunn, Neubiberg, Oberhaching and the entire greater Munich/Upper Bavaria region.
home.faq.q7: How does a project with ef-sinn work?
home.faq.a7: Every project follows four steps: 1) Personal initial consultation, 2) Detailed planning with sketches, material selection and transparent cost estimation, 3) Production in our workshop with the highest precision, 4) Professional on-site assembly with final adjustments.
home.faq.q8: What wood types does ef-sinn use?
home.faq.a8: We work with a wide variety of high-quality wood types – oak, beech, ash, walnut, cherry and many more. We prefer regionally sourced and sustainably managed timber and are happy to advise you on the ideal wood choice for your project.
home.cta.title: Ready for your custom project?
home.cta.text: Let us turn your ideas into handcrafted reality together.
footer.tagline:
Quality and craftsmanship for years.
Your partner for custom woodwork.
